titles.title: People of the Lord There Is One Body

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is one body We have one Lord United in the spirit We are going forth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With His praises on our lips And a sword in our hands We are marching on with power As we possess this land

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are the people of the Lord We're a holy nation A chosen generation Called to show forth His praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are the people of the Lord We're a holy nation Believers in Jesus Lifting up our voices to the Lord
